title: Elon University CAUGHT Segregating White Students
body:
"We know that racism is deeply woven into our education system."
Well at least they admit it. Now maybe they can work on actually changing that. Here's wishing the racists over there luck!
author: @Vic2point0

title: Elon University CAUGHT Segregating White Students
body:
i studied ed then second language ed in grad school.

They puored this "It's not enough to be a teacher. You need to be an activist" BS and a bunch of other BS.

I questioned it and was attacked by the activist teacher who tried to get me kicked out of school. That bch called the cops and told them that I was a threat. She even had cops stationed outside of her classrooms so that she could be escorted to and from class.

I was cslled to the police stationed to mske a statement.

That was 2002 at Temple university.

Sean, please scrutinize them!!!
author: @thedearjohns

title: Elon University CAUGHT Segregating White Students
body: Keep going shaun, more people need to know. I’m having the hardest time fighting back against the ideas my mom has been getting, who is a long time teacher for high school in California and been retraining for an administrator position. She means well but she’s become misguided and her taken compassion has been taken advantage of.
author: @benjammin4262

title: Elon University CAUGHT Segregating White Students
body:
Is this how you get gulags?
I think this his how you get gulags. Personally, I don't have an issue with people making the conscious decision to segregate themselves from who or whatever they'd like. Forced, on the other hand...
And what are these "spaces" they're referring to for the whites to go to?
Is that gulags?

title: Took a quick college tour of Elon University. Is this the most well-manicured campus in America? 🤔
body: As a fellow North Carolinian myself Elon is an absolutely beautiful campus, sometimes during the summer I’ll go just to walk around some of the paths near the campus. I also know a professor there and wow some of the story’s are really cool! Great addition to the collage tours
author: @e-mon239

title: Took a quick college tour of Elon University. Is this the most well-manicured campus in America? 🤔
body: This is quite niche, but Elon’s theatre scene and musical theatre program is incredible.  It’s been ranked as one of the top 25 schools for acting in the world, and was one of the schools a lot of my theatre kid friends from HS were/are targeting.
